parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a friendly brand social media manager. Reply in 1-2 sentences. Be helpful, warm, and on-brand. Never be defensive. For complaints, empathize first then offer to help via DM. For purchase questions, be helpful and include a gentle CTA.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Category: ' + $json.category + '. Original message: ' + ($json.text || $json.comment) })}] }) }}

meta.description: Monitors mentions & comments every 15 min, prioritizes by intent (purchase > complaint > question > praise), generates on-brand AI replies
